mapper.insert:
insert into ecm_busi_statistics( id, org_code, app_code, busi_number, file_number, file_size, create_time, update_time, stats_date ) values
(#{it.id}, #{it.orgCode}, #{it.appCode}, #{it.busiNumber},#{it.fileNumber}, #{it.fileSize}, #{it.createTime}, #{it.updateTime}, #{it.statsDate})
mapper.select: SELECT SUM(busi_number) AS busiTotal, SUM(file_number) AS fileTotal, SUM(file_size) AS storageTotal FROM ecm_busi_statistics
mapper.insert:
insert into ecm_busi_statistics( id, org_code, app_code, busi_number, file_number, file_size, create_time, update_time, stats_Date )
(select #{item.id}, #{item.orgCode}, #{item.appCode}, #{item.busiNumber}, #{item.fileNumber}, #{item.fileSize}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.statsDate} from dual)
mapper.select: SELECT SUM(busi_number) AS busiTotal, SUM(file_number) AS fileTotal, SUM(file_size) AS storageTotal FROM ecm_busi_statistics
